ci_boundary: Generated artifacts, plans, and JSON manifests are testable without MATLAB installed.
description: MATLAB-native popup tutor contract for BME circuits and signal-conditioning labs. The API returns generated artifacts, focus maps, probe plans, and lab-delta comparisons without requiring MATLAB in CI.

assumptions: The source and ADC input are ideal unless Lab Delta suggests otherwise.
The RC stage is modeled as a first-order low-pass filter.
The example waveform is educational and ECG-like, not patient data.
labs.bme_safety_boundary: This is a signal-conditioning teaching model, not biomedical safety verification or patient-connected design approval.
idealizations: No op-amp buffer loading is included in the initial artifact.
Component tolerances are represented as Lab Delta causes, not random simulation.
ADC quantization is summarized instead of modeled as a device datasheet.
labs.objective: Connect the hand cutoff calculation to a Simulink-style filter and sampled waveform before an ADC.
labs.title: RC anti-aliasing before ADC

assumptions: Ideal op-amps in the stub artifact.
Matched resistor ratios for common-mode rejection.
labs.bme_safety_boundary: Human-connected instrumentation requires isolation, leakage-current limits, and approved medical-safety design practices.
idealizations: No finite CMRR or input bias simulation in the stub.
labs.objective: Preview the future popup workflow for differential/common-mode reasoning and feedback-loop highlighting.
labs.title: Instrumentation amplifier intro

source_of_truth_rule: LLM prose is not the numerical authority; tutoring is grounded in explicit models, hand checks, generated artifacts, simulation evidence, and student-visible reasoning steps.
title: CiTT MATLAB Popup Tutor
